title: T-003 — Reference table waste_categories (02-SETTINGS §8 extension)
prompt:
# T-003 — Reference table waste_categories

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §16.3 (cross-PRD additions), 10-FINANCE waste rollup consumer, ADR-034
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Register `waste_categories` reference table (industry-configurable). Used by NCR yield_issue rollup → 10-FINANCE waste cost allocation downstream consumer.

## Implementation contract
1. Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0092_waste_categories_reftable.sql` registers reference_tables row code=`waste_categories` with schema_json {code,label,fa_account_hint text,is_recoverable bool,category,i18n jsonb}.
2. Seed 6 baseline rows: spoilage_perishable, breakage_packaging, expired_inventory, off_spec_rework, off_spec_scrap, contamination_loss.
3. Server helper `apps/web/src/server/quality/wasteCategories.ts` exporting `getWasteCategories(orgId)`.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0092_waste_categories_reftable.sql [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/wasteCategories.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/wasteCategories.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0092 applied, when SELECT FROM reference_tables_rows WHERE table_code='waste_categories' runs, then 6 seed rows exist and exactly 1 has is_recoverable=true (off_spec_rework)
2. Given tenant context, when getWasteCategories(orgId) is called, then it returns 6 rows each with non-empty fa_account_hint and label translated keys for pl/en
3. Given a row insert with is_recoverable not boolean, then JSON-schema validation rejects it

pipeline_inputs.description: Register waste_categories reference table + seed 6 baseline rows + server helper for 10-FINANCE rollup consumer.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0092 inserts registry row with schema_json {code,label,fa_account_hint,is_recoverable,category,i18n}. Seeds 6 rows. Helper getWasteCategories under tenant RLS. Tests cover counts, fields, validator rejection.
out_of_scope: Do not implement NCR yield rollup (T-038)
Do not implement 10-FINANCE consumer (out of scope this module)
Do not register hold_reasons (T-001) or qa_failure_reasons (T-002)
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0092 is applied, when SELECT FROM reference_tables_rows WHERE table_code='waste_categories' runs, then 6 seed rows exist and exactly 1 has is_recoverable=true (off_spec_rework)
Given tenant context, when getWasteCategories(orgId) is called, then it returns 6 rows each with non-empty fa_account_hint and i18n keys for pl and en
Given a row insert with is_recoverable not boolean, then the reference_tables JSON-schema validator rejects it
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/wasteCategories.test.ts asserting count, fields, validator rejection before migration exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test wasteCategories'
risk_red_lines: Do not hardcode categories in finance code (must remain reference-table driven)
Do not omit fa_account_hint (10-FINANCE consumer needs the mapping seed)
